channel.title: YAML on Chen Kai Blog
channel.description: Recent content in YAML on Chen Kai Blog

item.title: Docker and Containers (5): Docker Compose — Multi-Container Applications
item.description: The previous articles taught you how to run containers with docker run, pass port mappings with -p, create networks with docker network create, and mount volumes with -v. Now imagine doing that for a web server, an API backend, a database, a cache, and a task queue — every time you start your development environment. Docker Compose replaces those 20+ commands with a single file and a single command: docker compose up.
